ops.text: `cc-notes status` — the exact orient command the UserPromptSubmit hook recommends — fails in cc-squash with `error: invalid sha "21aab439"` (likely a stale/dangling ref under refs/cc-notes). Orientation is dead at session start; I had to route around it via `cc-notes task show <id>` and MCP search tools, which cost a subagent round-trip. status should skip or report unresolvable refs instead of hard-failing on the first bad sha.
